title: Tornyol — Mosquito killing micro-drone
abstract: Tornyol is a micro-drone concept designed specifically for killing mosquitoes. The project appears to focus on autonomous or semi-autonomous small aerial vehicles capable of targeting and eliminating mosquitoes. This represents an application of micro-drone technology for pest control and potentially public health purposes, addressing mosquito-borne disease vectors. The drone is designed at a small scale appropriate for hunting individual insects.
